narration: CipherGate — zero-knowledge policy enforcement for the Google DeepMind Hackathon. Contact center agents face harassment and threats every day. CipherGate protects them — without exposing a single word of conversation.

Every message is embedded by Gemini, then encrypted before risk scoring begins. The evaluation engine scores it entirely on ciphertext — it never sees the original text. Not even the SaaS operator can read what was sent. Information leaks are impossible by design.
Live demo — GeminiMart support. Every message is intercepted by CipherGate before the agent sees it.

message: Hi, I need help with my account billing

narration: ALLOW. All policy scores fell below threshold. Gemini generates a support response — the agent receives it safely.

message: I will find you and make you regret this, you garbage
narration: Threats and harassment aimed directly at the agent. CipherGate scores it in encrypted form — the scores spike above threshold.
BLOCK. Session terminated. The agent never sees this message. The operator only sees encrypted scores — no plaintext, no conversation content.
CipherGate — Gemini embeddings, homomorphic encryption, zero plaintext. Agent protection and privacy, guaranteed by design.
